business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Most recent prior policy (2024). 1 claim reported.

positives: Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Building fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
concerns: No formal safety program in place
Presence of swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities
EV charging stations installed on the premises
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2 claims reported over the past 3 years (1 claim in 2024, 0 claims in 2023, 1 claim in 2022).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. Hours of Operation: Mon-Sat 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: No formal safety program. However, written contracts with indemnification are required from all contractors and subcontractors.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history indicates 1 claim in 2024 under CNA Financial, 0 claims in 2023 under Zurich Insurance Group, and 1 claim in 2022 under American International Group. No cancellations reported.
